the sweet young toon girl named pizzelle lives in a small town where the donut shop is a local favorite  
pizzelle makes donuts every day to feed a dozen people just in case she gets a sudden influx  
she has no one to give her extra supply to and the donuts will spoil if not eaten soon  
she decides to eat all of them to avoid throwing them away  
she becomes incredibly and attractively overweight in doing so  
the donuts are perfectly fine and she is not unhappy with the result  
she finds a way to balance her need to eat and her need to make donuts  
the plot follows her realization and the consequences of her choice  
the story ends with her being overweight and the donuts still in her hands
